interpretation.chatgptAuditFocus: Tail concentration (2×/5×/10× market median), morning vs evening spread, top-book vs bottom-book pay, cap-hit rate for franchise-tier hosts.
interpretation.nominalNote: salary1981$ uses rough CPI deflator for cross-era intuition only — game uses nominal $ for that calendar year.
interpretation.realismHypothesis: If pctAt5x and morning/evening ratios are low and pctAtCap is high, stars may not feel like franchise assets despite share/tenure hooks.
